dom.title: Kimbrandesign
dom.description: KIMBRANDESIGN is a strategic brand transformation studio led by Kim Sentis. With over 15 years of experience in cosmetics, branding and marketing, Kim partners with brand leaders to clarify vision, unlock new positioning and guide meaningful transformation.

og.v: KIMBRANDESIGN is a strategic brand transformation studio led by Kim Sentis. With over 15 years of experience in cosmetics, branding and marketing, Kim partners with brand leaders to clarify vision, unlock new positioning and guide meaningful transformation.

headings.text: Shaping the beauty of everyday brands
The Power of Algae When the sensorial richness of algae meets the living force of the ocean, for the benefit of the skin.
L’Art de Nourrir les Peaux Where rich care blends with gourmand textures and sensorial fragrances, nourishing the skin for the pleasure of the senses.
The Symbiocene Where breakthrough biotechnology opens the path to a new symbiosis between humans, food and nature.
Iconic since 1963 Where timeless simplicity meets the confidence of an iconic blue, celebrating the heritage of a reliable everyday essential.
The Art of the Journey Where retail and spa experiences become moments of discovery, connection and well-being within the Club Med universe.
Protection You Can Trust Where expert care, natural protection and gentle design come together to safeguard the youngest lives.
The Guccification of Beauty Where self-expression, eclectic beauty and bold aesthetics redefine the codes of the make-up universe.
Give the Gift of Time Where the simple gesture of offering a watch becomes a symbol of connection, elegance and precious moments.
A tailored team for each project.

children.text: Shaping the beauty of everyday brands
A tailored team for each project.
